title: Kiali
description: Kiali documents installation material for Kiali in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an operation page for the service-mesh class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Kiali architecture, 설치, Keycloak, Service, and Reference, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include istio, install, infrastructure, and observability, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / observability / kiali / install / index, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
